review_title: Twiser Review
description: Overall, I was satisfied with the product.
author: Güven A.
pros: Before I have met with WOKR, I was familiar with the OKR methodology. I knew that many huge companies had benefitted from its features. Consequently, I have made a research about whether or not it's implemented in software and bingo! I found the WOKR. The most powerful part of the software is the core mentality.
cons: Some of the interfaces can be improved. User experience can be improved with the feedbacks from customer.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The platform that allows me to express myself in the best possible way
description: I enjoy the Twiser OKR system. I love setting my quarterly or annual OKRs, track my progress and see what my team members are up to. Trough the feedback and 1:1 I am able to explain my concerns and suggest some improvements for our company culture. I feel like everything I do matters, because nothing goes unnoticed or unrecognized.
author: Hakan C.
pros: I think that what makes Twiser different is its simplicity! It’s easy to use and it provides a clear and open communication with my team. The customer support is amazing, and even OKR resources frequently published on the website have supported us in a very beneficial way!
cons: Things are going well and we can see value and result from day 1. So nothing to dislike.

review_title: The transition to the system was very easy, fast and hassle-free. They are great at integration.
author: Zeynep Y.
pros: After they decided to use the system, they completed the integration in a very short time like 10 days. They guided us by following the process step by step. Thank you so much for being so caring and solution oriented. They never leave us alone with their very fast and solution-oriented approach whenever we have difficulties.
cons: There is no negative feature that I can say at the moment, the system meets all our needs.

review_title: Increasing the dialogue about goals has enabled us to achieve success
description: Before using wokr, it was not possible to see the developments regarding our goals so clearly. We were not realize how our daily work contributed to our goals. We positioned Wokr as a management tool, so we can use our resources very efficiently. Nobody is dealing with a business that will not make an impact. With Work, everyone can see the target of each other or the company very clearly, so all priorities are now evaluated by looking at the impact they will create.
author: Busra Y.
pros: With the one-on-one meeting step in Wokr, everyone in the company meets with a top manager at the same time, discusses their goals and determines the actions to be taken. Thus, everyone in the company talks about the future rather than measuring the past. We can see clearly where everyone's target is at any time. Thus, it is a platform that offers us serious data about targets.
cons: There are different features that can be added to the platform that will benefit us. When we submit our development requests, they are always seriously evaluated and fast actions are taken.

review_title: Twiser meets all our expectations and needs
description: My company is very happy with the platform because it meets our needs and expectations, and it is easy to use. Our goal planning and progress tracking have been significantly improved ever since we switched to Twiser.
author: Şevval Ö.
pros: I'm enjoying using the platform and find it a useful tool. It has a very good customizability and helpful set of features that we can use to improve our workflow.
cons: There is not anything specific that I dislike about Twiser.

review_title: Definitely recommend this software to my friends working for other companies
description: Twiser is a user friendly and very flexible performance management tool that can be used in any small/ medium business and also a large corporation. I would definitely recommend it to my friends working for other companies. It’s must-have for any business willing to climb the top of the mountain.
author: Oğuz Ö.
pros: I work mainly remotely due to the changed work culture after pandemic, and using this performance management platform is almost like having a best friend or even a personal psychologist! No kidding. You can have one-on-one conversations with your manager and share how you feel about your work etc., give and request feedback, and assess your colleagues. I think this is amazing! I don’t feel excluded at all even if I don’t get to see my team on a daily basis. Our internal communication goes really smoothly thanks to Twiser OKR tool.
cons: Nothing to complain about at the moment. Everything is excellent!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Feedback - Birsen Kayhan
description: The reason for using Twiser software is to help us keep organized and understand what gaps are missing in our growing business. Now that we have started applying Twiser, we realize there is a number of issues we have to solve. Anyway, my overall experience has been great. I believe that this tool would not only satisfy my companies needs but also our employees will benefit from it. The support team always spends as much time as we need to explain what we don’t understand or have difficulties trying to learn.
author: Birsen K.
pros: Twiser’s customer support is amazing! What we pay for the software is quite reasonable price, and the support is just beyond great. The tool itself is super helpful. I like that all my and my colleagues’ goals and progress are visible to everyone. It keeps us aligned.
cons: I am not sure I can provide any cons at the moment, at least I haven’t encountered any flaws or gaps yet. Just maybe would be nice to have a richer functionality in the future.

review_title: Getting things done in a timely manner and having open communication within company with Twiser
description: Communication with Twiser’s OKR platform is easy, open and clear as it increases employee engagement. Twiser has provided our company different ways for improving our employees performance management and keeping track of what everyone does. I especially find the competency evaluation feature super useful. I can assess my manages or my peers skills and performance, and I can also see the whole data on the dashboards.
author: hatice A.
pros: I use Twiser to make sure that I am implementing my goals and tasks on time. Nothing is more satisfying than seeing and telling my manager that I have successfully completed all of my tasks. I can also let them know what went well and what could have been done a little better so that we are able to improve our processes to provide the best services to our customers.
cons: I have not found anything about Twiser that I do not like.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Twiser makes everyone in company matter
author: Canan K.
pros: I enjoy using Twiser because it provides my company an easy way to give and receive feedback. Thanks to this feature, we can talk about anything, like for example, what we managed to achieve during a given period of time and even suggest something to improve at our organization. I think our employees are more sincere when they write about how they feel.
cons: There is nothing that I dislike that comes to my mind.

review_title: OKR Management
author: Özkan Ö.
pros: I love Twiser company who helped me to understand what is OKR and how to use it. That's why I love it.
cons: I wish I want to meet T.wiser before :)

review_title: Twiser product (Wokr) Rewiev
description: Helpfull team, Professional approach, user friendly product
author: Tuğçe H.
pros: Userfriendly dashboards and fluency. Easy to understand and track.
cons: I have not had a negative experience with product

review_title: “Very intuitive and easy to use performance management tool”.
description: In my opinion Twiser is an excellent performance management software. It includes all the necessary functions and features like 360-degree feedback, competency evaluation, check-in meetings. I love to see the summed up info on the dashboard with charts and numbers. I really like this software!
author: atiye T.
pros: The software is easy to use for all types of teams within an organization. We didn’t encounter any difficulties while embedding it. The 1-on-1s are a great feature that helps to set the right priorities to focus on. I think it’s a great opportunity to keep the team
cons: So far I like everything about this tool. I like how easy it is to use. It’s also very intuitive.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Twiser OKR
description: From strategic planning to daily execution, Twiser has become an indispensable tool in our quest for success. Highly recommended for any organization serious about maximizing their OKR effectiveness.
author: Ceyda İ.
pros: Twiser has revolutionized our approach to OKR management, offering a seamless and intuitive platform for setting, tracking, and achieving our objectives. Its user-friendly interface makes it easy for team members to collaborate, align goals, and stay focused on what matters most. With features like progress tracking, real-time updates, and insightful analytics, Twiser empowers us to drive performance and foster a culture of accountability.
cons: While Twiser excels in its current functionalities, there are some technical improvement opportunities that could enhance the user experience further. For instance, optimizing loading times for larger data sets and introducing more customization options for reports would add significant value. However, it’s worth noting that the Twiser team is receptive to user feedback and consistently works on refining the platform.

review_title: User Experience
description: My overall opinion of Twiser is that it makes companies and senior management consider mental health and life-work balance of their employees. It also makes me think about how I am feeling about my work, reset priorities if necessary and view my progress or lack of it on a single portal. My experience with Twiser has been positive as it supported me in my development and work relationships. It really encourages to achieve more, because it recognizes my milestones. The main advantage of it is that we can stay aligned with the whole company.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It’s super easy to use and supports best practices encouraging valuable and constructive feedback. There are so many new things I learnt while using this OKR software. It helps me to keep track of my objectives and see where I am and where I want to go. I like that I have access to the same kind of information about my team members.
cons: Can’t think of anything. We are very satisfied with the tool.

review_title: next generation performance management
description: Twiser and its product WOKR are strategic partner in the challenging business world we live in
author: Ahmet A.
pros: It is user-friendly and easy to apply. Being user-friendly and understandable let us focusing core objectives and their key results.
cons: Twiser is offering the best fit solution with their flexible product suitable for various needs, and strong team expertise.

review_title: Experience with Twiser
description: With Twiser we have been able to set and align all the company's goals. It's very easy to have follow up meetings to review the status of the goals and also to keep them up to date. Twiser helps you focus on your priorities and track your progress easily. It keeps all the company ongoings transparent.
author: dilek Y.
pros: I like Twiser because it's very easy to use and has a great package of features you need to create and manage your OKRs in an agile environment. Twiser is not all-in-one kind of tool, they are fully focused on the OKR methodology which makes it an ideal goal-setting tool. Among all the features I use most frequently one-on-ones and feedback. The OKR Academy available on the website provides lots of useful additional information about OKR framework and is a great resource for those starting out on their OKR journey. Our company tried a few other similar platforms but found them to be confusing and difficult to handle. Twiser is perfectly suited to the needs of small and medium size organisations (and probably large corporations too) that are striving to embed OKR into their strategy execution.
cons: There is almost nothing not to like about this platform. I rely on Twiser to plan, communicate and manage my goals.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fantastic crew, always ready to help and be there for any question.
description: It helped us a lot to know what goal everyone in the company was moving towards. So we made sure that everyone was working on important priorities. Doing this from a user-friendly platform instead of from excel changed everything. In the past, our employees were not very fond of entering and tracking targets. Together with Wokr, we, as the Human Resources team, carry out this process very easily. With the detailed reports provided by Wokr, we have also converted many of the reports we prepared manually into digital.
author: Elif G.
pros: Twiser didn't just sell us some software and step aside. They always continue to provide support with their teams that are always available. They hold regular follow-up meetings with us so that we write effective OKRs and this process benefits our company. They are constantly sharing documents that can be useful to us.
cons: Explaining OKR to everyone in the company can be difficult at first. Twiser helped us with educational support in this regard. We conducted trainings in which both OKR methodology and screen usage were explained in detail.

review_title: Best new generation tool for OKRs
description: Overall experience with Twiser is awesome. Not just for software, Twiser also has a great support and consulting team. They made a measurable impact on Yıldız Holding's OKR journey
author: Nida K.
pros: It is easy to use, adaptable, and extremely user-friendly screens, good UX design Tracing all company OKRs on one screen. It offers a new generation of people-oriented performance management approaches.
cons: Actually I use it everyday and its really good! Can't complain much but I would love to see a mobile features soon.

review_title: Great platform that makes all our goals transparent and keep all teams aligned
description: We have many teams in our company, but our objectives were not aligned. We were not well aware of what’s going on within our organization. Thanks to Twiser, we have a tool to see what other teams are doing, what kind of goals they are setting and we can align ourselves with them. It is also great to measure and monitor the important things and to enhance productivity, quality of work or any other things that should be improved.
author: Özge K.
pros: I love lots of things about this OKR software. First of all, it helps me organize my work better, prioritize my goals and focus on what matters most at the given moment, allows me to stay up to date and get things done in a timely manner. One-on-one meetings and feedback features makes so easy to communicate ideas to my manager or my team members instantly without making the whole process bureaucratic and too long. I want to say huge thanks to Twiser – they are not only acting like our partners, but also as friends! They genuinely want to have a positive impact on the organizations that use their product, and this is invaluable!
cons: Nothing really bothers us. Me and my colleagues are very pleased with the tool.

review_title: Twiser helps you to focus on important objects by tracking concrete metrics along with all staffs together
author: Alper Y.
pros: It makes easier to focus on the important objects, tracking the concrete progress and making strategy open&clear for all company staff
cons: A couple of bugs which have been solved extremely fast

review_title: “Simplicity and functionality – two-in-one”.
description: I highly recommend Twiser to everyone. It helps you stay connected with your management and team so that they are aware of how you're feeling, how you did in the past and what you’re up to in the future. This really has a significant influence on our company strategy planning and execution.
author: Başak A.
pros: I love the simplicity of Twiser! It has a very attractive and eye-pleasing design and layout and is easy to board on and use. Most of all I love being able to give praise to my team and giving / getting instant feedback. This makes our internal communication open and honest, even with people I rarely interact with. Twiser helps us be transparent in what we want and what we do.
cons: I don’t know anyone in my company who does not enjoy using this platform. There's a lot of functionality in it and it makes us stay aligned with each other.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy and Valuable Product
description: Giving and receiving feedback,holding 1:1 meetings, viewing your achievements on your own performance dashboard makes WORK a great space for employee recognition and appreciation. It is also super easy to use for any of our team members with any skill level.
author: Ersin G.
pros: Easy to use navigation and the future. The application can show all requirement what we need.
cons: There is nothing we didn't like it. The application meet our needs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Gözde G.
pros: Being able to see clearly where my company is going gives me great vision. Apart from that, since we are an agile team, we manage our team goals very easily thanks to Wokr. We can directly see and follow what the work we complete in sprints affects in the big picture. As the platform interface is very user-friendly, we did not have any difficulties in getting used to it. It is a self-using system just like social media tools.
cons: Even if there are problems in the system, we can immediately reach one of the support team and solve our problem quickly.

review_title: Wokr allows us to communicate more efficiently and openly, especially within hybrid wokr model
description: My experience with Twiser has been excellent so far. I would gladly suggest this software to my friends who are working for other companies too for using this performance management tool. This software is also super flexible and works perfectly for our changing needs.
author: Feride Y.
pros: We are managing the performance, goal development, and onboarding process using this tool. It can be very efficient for both smaller companies and large ones, that need to address these issues.
cons: Nothing so far but the sales and technical team gave us the confidence that they would support us if we have challenges in the future

review_title: user-friendly and easy to use
description: My overall experience was good! The OKR tool is effective, straightforward and easy to understand. We are still learning however the Twiser customer support specialists are very responsive and always eager to assist.
author: Çağıl Ç.
pros: It’s a very user-friendly, easy to use, and simple application. It’s perfect for small startups as well as mid-size and huge companies. Twiser customizes very well. The service is outstanding, the staff has a lot of expertise and made our OKR transition process as easy as it could be providing constructive feedback, advice, best practices, and recos to fit our business needs.
cons: I haven’t experienced any troubles with either the software or the customer service. All is going well; we are very excited about new upcoming features Twiser is working on.
